_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Auto-Merge Resolver — Observability + Per-Project Control

steps.description: Database: alembic migration creating merge_auto_verdicts (composite PK, verdict CHECK constraint) + auto_merge_project_config (per-project phase + runtime override); ORM models in orch/db/models.py.
Per-agent review of S01: schema correctness, append-only invariant (existing daemon_events still append-only), FK targets, CHECK constraints, ORM model fidelity.
QV: Alembic migration round-trip + drift check

Pipeline: executor/auto_merge.toml [health] section (probe_interval_seconds, failure_rate_threshold_per_day); orch/daemon/auto_merge.py AutoMergeConfig extended with HealthConfig fields and back-compat defaults.
Per-agent review of S04: TOML schema, loader extension, defaults-when-section-absent, no regression on Phase 0/1 plumbing.

Backend: new orch/auto_merge_aggregator.py (8 queries + MODEL_PRICING + resolve_project_config); new orch/daemon/auto_merge_health.py (daemon probe task); update orch/daemon/auto_merge.py + orch/daemon/merge_queue.py to use resolve_project_config(); wire probe into daemon main loop.

Per-agent review of S06: config resolution determinism (Inv 2), per-project override semantics, MODEL_PRICING coverage, daemon health-probe non-blocking (Inv 7), no UPDATE/DELETE on daemon_events (Inv 1).

API: new dashboard/routers/auto_merge_ui.py with 7 endpoints (page, status fragment, events fragment, event detail modal, verdict POST, config POST, rollup fragment); register router in dashboard/app.py.
Per-agent review of S08: endpoint contracts, request/response shapes, validation (phase∈{0,1}, runtime enabled), 400/413 error paths, htmx fragment vs full page responses.

Frontend: page template + 6 fragments; status chip include from base.html; sidebar nav entry; CSS additions to dashboard/static/styles.css (CR-00033 fallback rule); diff viewer uses difflib.HtmlDiff side-by-side; Settings panel form.
Per-agent review of S10: chip visibility gating on phase>=1 (Inv 6); template-render correctness; htmx swap targets; CSS additions append-only; no Jinja %-format vs .format mismatch (I-00075 lesson).
Cross-agent final review of S01..S11 (implementation cross-cut): config resolution chain end-to-end, marker handoff intact, append-only invariant respected, F-00081 pattern reuse correct.

Tests: unit tests (aggregator, config_resolution, health, pricing); integration tests (observability AC1-9, control_surface AC10-14); dashboard TestClient tests for each endpoint; AC9 regression sweep on adjacent pages.
Per-agent review of S13: AC coverage matrix, assertion strength (event_type AND specific metadata), isolation rules, no real LLM calls, FakeLLM at Python boundary.
Final cross-agent review including tests: implementation × tests round-trip, every AC + Invariant + Boundary mapped to at least one test, production-readiness for Phase 1 audit.
QV: Linting
QV: Assertion scanner
QV: Formatting
QV: Type checking
QV: Unit tests
QV: Integration tests
QV: Diff coverage
QV: Secret scan

QV: Browser verification — chip on header, page render empty + seeded, diff viewer modal, inline + modal verdict persistence, Settings panel writes (phase + runtime), phase=0 hides chip, no regressions on adjacent project pages.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill (focus on multi-layer cross-cut between DB, daemon, dashboard).
